commit_scope: Add a bounded optimizer-state delta slice floor.

commands: coord claim optimizer-delta-slice-floor "Next model-data wall after PR #3157: add bounded optimizer-state delta slice receipt; avoid live mesh transport, durable eval query, payload merkle proof, privacy/conflict, router/audio, and BML compiler lanes."

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/cell-sync.fk form-stdlib/slice-update-roundtrip.fk form-stdlib/slice-merge.fk form-stdlib/model-data-sharing.fk form-stdlib/tests/optimizer-delta-slice-band.fk
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh model-data-sharing model-slice-chunk-range

The fourth-arm gate returned `PASS-4WAY  optimizer-delta-slice`, and prior model-data gates still returned PASS-4WAY. Wellness reported no attention items.

ci_validation.notes: No push or PR yet for this lane.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Model data sharing now has a bounded optimizer-state delta slice receipt tied to an optimizer cell ref and chunk-range policy row.

phase_gate.gate: Optimizer state must have a shareable delta-slice receipt before optimizer-step math or live mesh exchange can be claimed as first-class.
phase_gate.next: Add optimizer-step math, live chunk payload merkle proof, mesh transport, durable eval query, and privacy/conflict receipts as separate bounded lanes.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Model data sharing had request/re-address/apply/source/merge and chunk-range policy receipts, while optimizer-state deltas remained a named next wall.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: optimizer-delta-slice returns 4095 four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
not_claimed: chunk-range payload merkle proof over a live carrier
